scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:assignment: npm install --prefix api-ts && npm install --prefix angular-spa
scripts.dev:assignment: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix api-ts" "npm start --prefix angular-spa"
scripts.build:assignment: npm run build --prefix api-ts && npm run build --prefix angular-spa
